credit-my-cc-title: Main page title / heading. Asks the user if someone is violating their Creative Commons license.
credit-my-cc-description:
Introductory description text. Contains HTML markup (
tags).
credit-my-cc-noscript: Message shown when JavaScript is disabled.
credit-my-cc-examples: Label for the collapsible examples section.
credit-my-cc-example-easy: Label for an easy example file.
credit-my-cc-example-multiple-creators: Label for an example with multiple creators.
credit-my-cc-example-pd: Label for a public domain example. PD = Public Domain.
credit-my-cc-example-no-license: Label for an example without a license.
credit-my-cc-example-no-info-template: Label for an example without an information template.
credit-my-cc-filename-label: Label for the filename input field.
credit-my-cc-filename-title: Tooltip for the filename input field.
credit-my-cc-button-check: Text on the button that looks up a file on Commons.
credit-my-cc-title-label: Label for the file title display.
credit-my-cc-usage-label: Label for the usage URL input field.
credit-my-cc-usage-title: Tooltip for the usage URL input field.
credit-my-cc-usage-placeholder: Placeholder text for the usage URL input field.
credit-my-cc-credit-label: Label for the attribution/credit input field.
credit-my-cc-credit-title: Tooltip for the attribution/credit input field.
credit-my-cc-credit-placeholder: Placeholder text for the attribution/credit input field.
credit-my-cc-upload-date-label: Label for the upload date input field.
credit-my-cc-upload-date-title: Tooltip for the upload date input field.
credit-my-cc-upload-date-placeholder: Placeholder for upload date, using date format with Y=year, M=month, D=day.
credit-my-cc-description-label: Label for the image description input field.
credit-my-cc-description-title: Tooltip for the image description input field.
credit-my-cc-description-placeholder: Placeholder text for the image description input field.
credit-my-cc-letter-type-label: Label for the letter type selector.
credit-my-cc-letter-type-title: Tooltip for the letter type selector.
credit-my-cc-letter-happy: Label for the happy/friendly letter tone option.
credit-my-cc-letter-neutral: Label for the neutral letter tone option.
credit-my-cc-letter-angry: Label for the angry/firm letter tone option.
credit-my-cc-letter-other: Label for the other letter types option.
credit-my-cc-button-write: Text on the button that generates the complaint letter.
credit-my-cc-copy-instructions:
Instructions for copying the generated letter. Contains HTML markup ( and
tags).
credit-my-cc-image-alt: Alt text for the thumbnail of the used image.
credit-my-cc-no-license:
Error message when no machine-readable license is found. Contains HTML (
tag).
credit-my-cc-no-information:
Error message when required metadata is missing. Contains HTML (
tag).
credit-my-cc-upload-date-note: Note explaining that the automatically filled date is the most recent upload date.
credit-my-cc-unsupported-license: Error message when the file has an unsupported license type.
credit-my-cc-public-domain:
Message when the file is in the public domain. Contains HTML (
tag).
credit-my-cc-cc0:
Message when the file is CC0 licensed. Contains HTML (
tag).
credit-my-cc-missing-file: Error message when the file could not be found on Commons.
credit-my-cc-random-url: Error message when the input looks like a URL rather than a filename.
credit-my-cc-api-error: Error message when the connection to the Wikimedia Commons API fails.
credit-my-cc-missing-parameter: Error message prefix for missing required fields. The field name is appended.
credit-my-cc-subject: Suggested email subject line for the complaint.
credit-my-cc-loading: Loading indicator text shown while fetching data from Commons.
credit-my-cc-since-date: Text fragment appended to indicate when the original was uploaded. $1 is a date string (e.g. '2024-01-15').
credit-my-cc-of-object: Text fragment appended to indicate the subject of the image. $1 is a description (e.g. 'a sunset').
credit-my-cc-footer-produced-for: Footer credit line. $1 is a link to Wikimedia Sverige. $2 is a link to the current maintainer (Lokal_Profil). $3 is the name of the original author (André Costa).
credit-my-cc-footer-source: Footer source code line. $1 is a link to the GitHub repository.
credit-my-cc-footer-logo: Footer logo credit line. $1 is the BY icon link, $2 is the CC BY 4.0 license link, $3 is the Speech bubble link.
credit-my-cc-language-selector: Label for the language selection dropdown.
credit-my-cc-letter-template-happy:
Complete complaint letter in a friendly/happy tone. This is a full HTML letter from greeting to signature. Contains HTML markup for formatting (paragraphs, lists, spans). Translators are free to restructure the letter entirely.

Placeholders:
* $1 = description fragment (e.g. ' of a sunset'), may be empty
* $2 = the URL where the image is improperly used
* $3 = upload date fragment (e.g. ' since 2024-01-15'), may be empty
* $4 = URL to the original file on Wikimedia Commons
* $5 = how the author wants to be credited (may contain HTML)
* $6 = the license name (e.g. 'CC BY-SA 4.0')
* $7 = URL to the license text
* $8 = the file title on Commons
* $9 = an example online attribution line (HTML)
* $10 = an example print/offline attribution line (plain text)
credit-my-cc-letter-template-neutral: Complete complaint letter in a neutral tone. Same structure and placeholders as {{msg-mw|credit-my-cc-letter-template-happy}}.
credit-my-cc-letter-template-angry: Complete complaint letter in an angry/firm/legal tone. Same structure and placeholders as {{msg-mw|credit-my-cc-letter-template-happy}}.
